Watch it build
an embryo.

A pluripotent sphere, a Wnt pulse, a drop of Matrigel — and stem cells build a trunk: neural tube and somites, no reference and no human. 7,837 cells. Press play and watch Novaflow annotate every lineage, order them in developmental time, and watch them self-organize into a body.
